paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.05, with a 2.02% increase from the prior close and a 36.32% decrease over a 20-session window. The price is as of July 17, 2026.

Recent news headlines include discussions of the company's CEO departure, governance concerns, and a $375 million convertibles deal. The news sources include Stocktwits, simplywall.st, and Yahoo Finance, with dates ranging from July 16 to July 18, 2026. The headlines mention the resignation of director designee Miles Everson and the completion of a note offering.

There have been recent SEC filings, including an 8-K form filed on July 15, 2026, regarding the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. Another 8-K form filed on July 13, 2026, discloses the resignation of director Miles Everson due to a disagreement over access to company books and records. There is also one Form 4 filing in the feed.
